432 M0800A_WRSNG_STG_2_ULCR_NUM M0800A_WRSNG_STG_2_ULCR_NUM M0800A Worsening Stage 2 Pressure Ulcer Since Prior Assessment Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of current Stage 2 pressure ulcers that were not present or were at a lesser stage
